placeholder-toast.wav.title: A Sample Track
placeholder-toast.wav.speaker: Forthcoming
placeholder-toast.wav.pullQuote: Here is where a voice will live — a toast, a blessing, the long pause before the laugh.
placeholder-toast.wav.transcript:
When the weekend comes, the toasts will be recorded and kept in this space.
Each voice arrives with its own waveform, its own photograph easing in from the edge.
The words you are reading now scroll in time with the audio, the current line lifting in gold.
This is only a sample, holding the shape of what comes after the sixth of June.
